theme.background_note: Slides use white background (bg1=lt1=FFFFFF). File2 master has a warm grey tone (#BCB8AF) but individual slides are white.
theme.source_note: File1 (물류리포트): cx=12192000 × cy=6858000. File2 (호텔컨버전): cx=17610138 × cy=9906000. Layout coords below are normalised to File1 dimensions (12192000×6858000) as primary reference.

logo.description: SRC horizontal wordmark (231×35 px), extracted from ppt/media/image3.png of File1 slideLayout12.
logo.location: bottom-left corner of every content slide (via slideLayout)

src_text_style.note: SRC logo is image-based (no separate text element). Header of title slide displays 'SRC Research' as text.

colors.primary_note: Dominant brand green-grey; used for header bar cell fill, section numbers, borders, and emphasis text across File1.
colors.accent_dark_note: Deep forest green; primary text and chart fill in File2 (호텔컨버전).
colors.accent_blue_note: Steel blue used for secondary chart series and sub-section labels (File1).
colors.accent_warm_note: Warm gold; sub-section label background and accent fills (File1).
colors.accent_salmon_note: Salmon; head-message text color for highlighted sections (File1).

fonts.primary_typeface_note: Exclusively used across both files. Theme major/minor fonts are '맑은 고딕' / 'Calibri' (Office default) but all real content uses Pretendard with various weights.

head_message.color_note: Salmon/warm accent for primary head message; alternatively #627365 (green-grey) for section titles.
head_message.usage: One-line sub-section heading above main content area (x=628044, y=1141611 in File1)

section_number.usage: Section/chapter number displayed in header bar left cell

header_bar_title.usage: Section title text in header bar (same style as section number)

sub_section_label.usage: Category label inside content sub-sections (small table headers within slides)

body.usage: Main body text, bullet points, table cell data (File1 dominant: sz=900 Pretendard Light, count=1906)

body_file2.usage: Main body text in File2 (호텔컨버전) — larger format document with more generous type sizing

table_header.usage: Table header row text (white on dark background)

footnote_source.usage: Source attribution text at bottom of slide (y=6237289 area, 'Source: ...')

page_number.usage: Slide page number, right-aligned (x=10424072, y=6482324 in File1)

title_slide_main.usage: Large title text on cover slide (File1 slide1)

file1.clrMap: bg1=lt1 tx1=dk1 bg2=lt2 tx2=dk2 accent1-6 standard

layouts.note: Coordinates are in EMU. File1 (12192000×6858000) is the primary reference. All layout elements consistently appear across slides 3-19 of File1.

title_table.note: Cover title in a no-border table; font Pretendard SemiBold sz=3200 color=#002060

subtitle_year.note: Year label below title; Pretendard Light sz=1800 color=#8CA1B7

content_slide_common.note: These elements appear on virtually every content slide (slides 3-19, File1).

header_bar.fill_note: Left cell has solid fill #627365; middle and right cells are transparent.

head_message.note: One-line section sub-heading below header bar

source_label.note: Source citation table at very bottom, multiple positions by content

body.note: Single-column text body area starting below head_message

body_large.note: Full-height text body when no chart/table below

sub_label.note: Sub-section label bar above chart (thin table with #A09567 text)

chart_left.note: Left chart area in two-column layout

chart_right.note: Right chart area in two-column layout

closing_slide.note: Slide20 (File1) uses a centered text box for closing message.

file2_content_slide.note: File2 (17610138×9906000) uses a different layout structure.

section_label.note: Horizontal breadcrumb/date label spanning full width

body_row_even.note: bandRow=true in some tables but no explicit band color — relies on table style

sub_header_table.note: Thin label bar above charts (cy=288000, ~22.7pt height)

chart_style.preferred_types_note: barChart is most frequent (File1: 15+ instances). lineChart and areaChart also appear.
chart_style.gridlines_note: Charts in both files have no visible gridlines in most instances.
chart_style.legend: minimal or none in most charts

notes: File1 (물류리포트) is 12192000×6858000 EMU (960×540pt). File2 (호텔컨버전) is 17610138×9906000 EMU (~1387×780pt). The non-standard File2 dimensions suggest a widescreen variant — use File1 dimensions as the standard 16:9 template.
Both files use exclusively Pretendard typeface family. The Office theme fonts (맑은 고딕, Calibri) are placeholders only.
Header bar '표 15' at (614160, 441327) with dimensions 10944225×650267 EMU appears on all 17 content slides of File1 — treat this as a mandatory template element.
Logo file outputs/logo_src.png is the definitive SRC horizontal wordmark (231×35 px, 2KB) placed at bottom-left of content slides.
Color #627365 (green-grey) is the dominant brand color in File1. Color #2D3734 (deep forest) dominates File2. Together they form the primary/secondary brand axis.
File2 theme clrScheme is named 'SRC' confirming these are official SRC brand files.
